sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("Key objects:")
for n in nodes:
    c = n['color']
    if c in ['W', 'M', 'G'] or (c == 'p' and n['pixels'] >= 15):
        center_r = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        center_c = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        print(f"  color={c} px={n['pixels']} center=({center_r},{center_c})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.content:
The state is the same as before - clicking the purple square at (55,27) didn't move it. The white is at (53,28) and goal is at (59,27). The purple square is still at (55,27).
Wait - looking at this more carefully, the white (W, 6px) is now at (53,28) which was the goal position. The goal (G, 8px) is at (59,27) which was the white position. So clicking the goal swapped them.
Now the goal is at (59,27) and the white is at (53,28). The purple square is at (55,27). I need to get the magenta/purple square to the goal at (59,27).
But clicking the purple square at (55,27) didn't advance it. Let me think about why...
Looking back at the pattern:
- First purple square was at (56,24), I clicked it, white moved there, new purple appeared at (49,30)
- Second purple at (49,30), clicked, white moved there, new purple at (54,28)
- Third purple at (54,28), clicked, white moved there, new purple at (55,27)
- Fourth purple at (55,27), clicked - nothing happened
Wait, the purple square at (55,27) has the same boundary as before: `[[54, 26], [54, 28], [55, 29], [57, 29], [59, 27], [57, 25], [55, 25]]`. It includes [59,27] which is where the goal is. So the purple square overlaps with the goal.
Maybe I need to click the white at (53,28) since that's where the trail/diamond is? Or maybe I need to click the goal at (59,27) again?
Actually, wait. Let me reconsider the game. Maybe the goal is to make the magenta pixel reach the goal. The magenta is at (56,27) and the goal is at (59,27). The purple square at (55,27) contains the magenta.
Maybe I need to click on the white diamond at (53,28) to advance the magenta? Or maybe I need to click somewhere between the magenta and goal?
Let me try clicking on the white diamond at (53,28).
